Tribhuvan University

Kathmandu

The oldest and largest public university in Nepal with a wide academic network.

Popular programs

MBBSBBAEngineeringLawSciencePublic Health

Dhulikhel

EngineeringMBAMedicineArchitectureScienceComputer Science

Biratnagar

A major public university serving eastern Nepal with technical and professional study paths.

Surkhet

A public university with programs across western and mid-western Nepal.

EngineeringEducationBBAAgricultureScienceManagement

Dang

Nepal’s dedicated university for Sanskrit, philosophy, and traditional scholarship.

Rampur
